# Rerange Docs For Agents

Rerange is a non-custodial liquid order protocol. It creates directional target-price orders as concentrated liquidity positions, reranges them as price moves, and closes them when conversion is complete.

Start here:

- Overview: /
- User guide: /users/
- Developer quickstart: /developers/
- Agent and resolver guide: /agents/
- Contract reference: /contracts/
- Deployments: /deployments/
- Agent skills catalog: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/README.md
- Agent skills manifest: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/manifest.json

Key facts:

- Hub coordinates orders and never custodies user funds.
- Vaults hold user tokens and LP positions.
- Adapters are stateless integrations for venues such as Uniswap v3 and v4.
- `targetTick` is fixed for the order.
- `triggerTicks` defines the maximum live range distance from target.
- SELL range: lower is `max(currentTick, targetTick - triggerTicks)`, upper is `targetTick`.
- BUY range: lower is `targetTick`, upper is `min(currentTick, targetTick + triggerTicks)`.
- Main maintenance call: `RerangeHub.rerange(bytes32 orderKey)`.
- Main state read: `RerangeHub.getOrderState(bytes32 orderKey)`.
- Main preview read for automation: `RerangeHub.previewRerange(bytes32 orderKey)`.
- Resolver rewards come only from target-asset fees.
- Referrer and treasury rewards come only from non-target-asset fees.
- Public deployments and addresses are canonical in https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/tree/main/protocol/deployments.
- Generated ABIs are canonical in https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/tree/main/protocol/abi.

Agent skills:

- Use protocol-discovery before other Rerange actions: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/protocol-discovery.md
- Use intent-order-builder to construct and preview new orders: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/intent-order-builder.md
- Use order-monitor for live state, progress, fees, lifecycle, and event reconciliation: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/order-monitor.md
- Use resolver-rerange for permissionless maintenance and batch execution: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/resolver-rerange.md
- Use vault-manager only for owner-authorized vault, delegation, close, and withdrawal workflows: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/vault-manager.md
- Use strategy-composer for DCA, grid, passive exit, rebalance, and treasury plans: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/strategy-composer.md
- Use safety-risk as mandatory preflight before opens, reranges, closes, or composed strategies: https://github.com/rerange-xyz/info/blob/main/skills/safety-risk.md
